en: Looking for, trying to open doors Ringing bells, sending them to hell
All sitting by my side, expecting no surprise
When it's about love, nothing will work, nothing will do
We'll break, we'll move, we'll make, we'll change
We'll lead, we'll pay, succeed
Peace of mind, a choice that's bright
The sage had said, control your head
Until the day you don't, your reason now is born
Switching on my lights, growing deep inside
Changing my tides, my nights, my sign, my mind
My heart, my sight, my life was right or wrong
I've finally found where I belong
My hopes and my dreams have all come along
And if you have diamonds, I'll sing this song
Today you remind you we both belong
We've finally found what we are for
And nothing can change it, I've got, I'm sure
Believe me, don't leave me behind at war
I'll break it, I'll make it, I'm sure
This is the time
And so under your door
Your reason now is born
Switching on my lights, crawling deep inside
Changing my tides, my nights, my sign, my mind
My heart, my sight, my life was right or wrong
I've finally found where I belong
My hopes and my dreams have all come along
And if you have diamonds, I'll sing this song
Today you remind you we both belong
We've finally found what we are for
And nothing can change it, I've got, I'm sure
Believe me, don't leave me behind at war
I'll break it, I'll make it, I'm sure
